title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm
notes: Server browser crashes the game. I was able enter servers through the Steam server browser. It runs smooth with some FPS drops in intense combat. The game crashes when transitioning to a new map.

title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: ignore ingame server menu, instead use steam server browser and multiplayer works that way
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: As of 3.16-4 the game no longer crashes when browsing the server list. .NET framework not installing can be ignored. To fix audio issues, you have to install xact via winetricks, protontricks or protonfixes.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: The training session ran fine. No issues.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: It crashed after a hour of play, and there are some graphical artifacts in the bottom left occasionally, however i was able to join back in with no problems. With more time for proton to develop i imagine this will run perfectly.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: No issues at all. Playable on PunkBuster protected servers.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm
Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: Game works out of the box, lower performance than on windows and occasional flickering but generally playable
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: .net fails, though the game will run, but it will annoy you everytime you want to run it again. There are audio errors in game - mainly with voice samples, which cut out and/or will play despite the fact youre nowhere near an enemy (example - you can hear Russian chatter even though they are all the way across a map). Music (such as the victory music) will play over the in-level music.  Much like Killing Floor 2 (which is based on RO2's engine), the game will sometimes not load after the flash screen.  You also get crashes in between levels loading. I also would occasionally get blank sever listings. Despite all of this, the game is playable.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: Similar to my experience with 3.16-4. Game gets as far as warning me about .NET 3.5 SP1. After that my steam name goes green for a few seconds (indicating I'm in game), where nothing happens. After that it just goes back to blue. Once or twice I got to the Punkbuster License agreement
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: After 3.16-5 Beta, no tweaks are needed to fix the audio and the game seems to run just fine.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes:
64 player match with medium settings was giving me 60fps~
The game runs without any problem.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: No tweaks needed but the general experience is diminished in a few places: Generally suboptimal performance, audio is still slightly crackly and occasionally light graphical glitches drop this from Platinum to Gold.
title: Red Orchestra 2: Heroes of Stalingrad with Rising Storm

notes: Works well. Game crashed one time when switching to 4k, but then it worked.
